label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out between what times David could have gone to the football field. The problem gives me several alibis or activities that David was doing at different times, and the football field was closed after 10pm. So David must have gone to the football field during a time when he wasn't doing any of the other activities mentioned. First, let me list out all the time intervals when David was seen doing other things. David woke up at 5am. That's just a starting point, not necessarily an activity. Steven saw David buying a phone from 5am to 6am. So 5-6am is taken up by that. Then Kimberly saw David taking photos near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 6am to 8am. So 6-8am is another activity. Betty saw David working out at the gym from 9am to 12pm. So 9-12pm is occupied. Lisa saw David driving to the water park from 12pm to 3pm. So 12-3pm is another activity. William
